name: Mixed Green Salad
recipeIngredient: 10 cups Watercress, red-leaf lettuce, and Belgian endive, bite-size, loosely packed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the vinegar, minced garlic, and Dijon mustard in a mixing bowl.
2. Blend well until combined.
3. Add the vegetable oil and season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Mix thoroughly using a wire whisk.
5. Place the onion rings and salad greens into a large serving bowl.
6. Toss the mixture well with the dressing.
7. Makes 4 to 6 servings.
